violations.text: Bucket used for prepping chicken were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Pastillitos was observed held at (119) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to proper temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage(garage), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
Bag of avocados were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
